entry.title: Re: PCR to check basic pay is greater than 5K
entry.content:
If I'm not mistaken, the first Operation under ESG 2 should be VWTCL 01  and the return values should be all possible values of Processing Class 01. 

Note that all values that should not be considered could be grouped together under return value * with Operation ADDWT *

Next, if you do a Payroll Simulation (with the "Display Log" box checked) for one employee, and drill down to PCR Y016, look at the WTs in the Input Table to that PCR, and at the processing of each WT.

entry.title: Re: Error msg during Factory Action - Copy execute in RAP...
entry.content:
Hello @Neil_Lee_057 ,

below are the following points I would check:
1. Factory data action is to be given in UI.Identification For Ex. type: #FOR_ACTION, label:'Copy', dataAction: 'copy' or at UI.Lineitem depending on where you want to position it.
2. Check if Redirection to parent is working as expected in the entity.
3. Check if alias mapping is properly assigned.

entry.title: Re: api_warehouse_order_task_2
entry.content: Hi, I have never used the "*" and would recommend against it - looking at the date code on your IF MATCH , it is from March 12. Usually you do the get and then immediately call the POST so it doesn't expire. According to the error, it is stale and the system did not find the match. I would recommend to call the GET and POST right after and see if it helps.

entry.title: Re: Is MB5B used in S4 Hana?
entry.content: As far as I know MB5B works in S/4HANA.

2) If yes, then do I really need cloud connector ?

Hello @rammel_sapdev ,

you can try to use RAP Managed application with an unmanaged save and write your custom logic while utilizing standard RAP Framework. You also have File Upload Functionalities available in RAP and can handled in the backend Behaviour Definition and Implementation.

We need to add a logo in the BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION Approval Form, is there any possibility yet ?

Gaurav

entry.title: SAP Learning and Adoption Forum 2025 - Save the Date
entry.content:
Künstliche Intelligenz und Cloud-Technologien verändern unsere Arbeitswelt zunehmend. Doch die bloße Einführung neuer Technologien reicht nicht aus. Um das volle Potenzial von SAP-Lösungen auszuschöpfen, braucht es das Zusammenspiel von Technologie und Mensch. Wissen, Akzeptanz, Commitment, Befähigung, sprich effektives Change Management sind entscheidend. 

Das SAP Learning and Adoption Forum 2025 unter dem Motto ACTIVATE HUMAN SUPERPOWERS! widmet sich genau diesem Thema. Am 25. Juni treffen sich SAP-Experten, Kunden und Partner in Walldorf (oder online), um gemeinsam zu erkunden, wie wir Lernen und Wandel in SAP-Projekten neu denken und so die Adoption nachhaltig verbessern. Dieser Blog-Beitrag gibt einen Vorgeschmack auf das Event und zeigt, warum Ihr dabei sein solltet. 

Activate Human Superpowers: Was erwartet Euch 2025?   

Im Fokus steht dieses Jahr die Frage, wie wir unsere "menschlichen Superkräfte" aktivieren können, um die digitale Transformation erfolgreich zu gestalten.  

  • Impulse durch Lightning Talks: Erfahrt von führenden Experten wie Jochen Robes vom Weiterbildungsblog oder Timo Deiner, CTO SAP MEE, wie Lernen und Wandel strategisch verankert werden kann. 
  • Good Practices: Lernt von anderen Unternehmen in 30-minütigen Knowledge Cafes, wie sie die Adoption von SAP-Lösungen erfolgreich vorantreiben. 
  • Networking: Knüpft wertvolle Kontakte zu SAP-Experten, Kunden und Partnern.  
  • Vorabend-Event: Verpasst nicht das Vorabend-Event am 24. Juni ab 18:30 Uhr mit einem Interview der Olympiasiegerin Yemisi Ogunleye und ersten Networking-Möglichkeiten (onsite only). 

Um die Interaktion und die Co-Creation der Teilnehmenden zu fördern, bieten wir dieses Jahr erstmalig 3 co-creative, interaktive Formate an: 

  • Ein Promtathon zum „Hands-On“ Erlernen und Ausprobieren von KI Skills 
  • Ein Workshop zur Erkundung und Exploration von KI Use-Cases im Learning und Change Management 
  • Ein Workshop zu Good Practices & Lessons Learned von SAP S/4HANA Transformationen 

Zielgruppe des Forums  

Das SAP Learning and Adoption Forum richtet sich an SAP-Experten, Change Manager:Innen, Projektleiter:Innen, Personalentwickler:Innen, Weiterbildungsverantwortliche und alle, die sich für die erfolgreiche Implementierung und Nutzung von SAP-Lösungen interessieren. Egal, ob Ihr Kunde oder Partner seid – das Forum bietet wertvolle Einblicke und Kontakte. 

Rückblick auf das Forum 2024: Future Learning, Leading Change   

Das SAP Training and Adoption Forum 2024 stand unter dem Motto "Future Learning, Leading Change". In Walldorf und virtuell kamen Experten zusammen, um sich über die neuesten Trends und Best Practices auszutauschen. Der Austausch in Knowledge Cafés und Impulsvorträge bot eine Plattform für den Wissensaustausch und die Vernetzung, die von allen sehr  geschätzt wurde. Wer das Event verpasst hat oder Inhalte noch einmal Revue passieren möchte, findet eine Zusammenfassung und alle Aufzeichnungen hier. 

Anmeldung und weitere Informationen zum SAP Learning und Change Forum

Seit Ihr bereit, Eure Superkräfte zu aktivieren? Dann besucht die Event-Seite für weitere Informationen und zur Anmeldung. Die ersten Teilgebenden stehen bereits fest.   

Und wer noch Anregungen hat - meldet Euch gerne hier in den Kommentaren. Auch suchen wir noch Community MitgliederInnen die uns bei unterschiedlichen Dingen unterstützen. Sei es Organisation oder auch bei den Workshops.

entry.title: Re: Material not defined for sales org distribution ch and language
entry.content: Hi Geetha, Did your issue got resolved? I am facing same issue with only one user.

entry.title: Re: SES Creator Assignment and Notification Based on PO C...
entry.content:
First of all, I like the way you have detailed your requirements --It seems it will be a mix of configuration and development -Check my responses next to your requirements 

  1. PO Created with Reference to PR (Purchase Requisition)

    • The PR creator should be nominated as the SES creator.---Make use of the requisitioner field as the mandatory field (via config) and make the drop-down help of UserID F4 help and validation that the user id is valid on the PR--as when you PO get created this field will flow to PO-- you can also write ABAP code where PR creator is requisitioner ID --however --user should have the ability to replace with other valid user ID 
    • The PR creator should receive a notification when the PO is created.--> This will be ABAP development --implementation of BADI 
    • Another notification should be sent when the delivery date is reached.-->This will be a program that can scheduled in the background as a job that runs daily say 7:00 am to send --you can copy existing program ME2N and send output to Requisitioner field of PO as it will be copied from PR to PO --so need to go back to PR table
    • Only the PR creator should be allowed to create the SES.--This will be a BADI --not standard

  2. PO Created Without PR

    • A field should be available to nominate the SES creator.---Point 1--Requisitioner field 
    • The recipient field, for example, should have a search help (F4) with a list of users.--Point 1--Drop-down F4 help to requisitioner  field --allow you select different user --
    • The entered name in the recipient field should be assigned as the SES creator.--This now known you do not additional field as SES creator as you using the standard requisitioner field available.
    • The SES creator should receive notifications when the PO is created and when the delivery date is reached.

  3. PO Created Without PR and Without Recipient Name

    • The system should allow any user with the appropriate role to create the SES.--This is enhancement and BADI for SES creation validation against the requisitioner field.

  4. PO Created with PR and Recipient Name

    • Both the PR creator and the recipient should be allowed to create the SES.--this is again the enhancement in SES transaction --BADI implementation or User Exit.

entry.title: Re: I need inputs on WebMethods “JDBC Notification” alter...
entry.content:
Hello @Naveen ,

We had similar situation we have choosen option 4 where CPI endpoint is given to Third party consumer and push the data in real time and insert the data into SAP system. only things to take care: handle asynchronous requests and failure and retrigger scenarios.

Can someone help us with this?

Thanks,
Gaurav

defining data models can be time consuming, having the ability to generate them (and then adjust or extend them) would be a great feature, as it would allow me to get some of the basics done and let me focus on other topics like UI and designing the app.

freight clearing account against freight expense account

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Wien - 03.04.2025
entry.content:
Ein gemütlicher Abend in lockerer Runde - zum zwanglosen Austausch über Themen rund um SAP und mehr.
Von der SAP Community, für die SAP Community.

Tritt der Gruppe Wien bei und subscribe den Blog-Post SAP Stammtisch Wien um über zukünftige Events informiert zu werden.

Bitte um verlässliche Zusage mit der RSVP Option rechts - das erleichtert uns die Reservierung in den jeweiligen Lokalen sehr.

entry.title: Re: Unable to trigger the iflow in SAP CPI free trail acc...
entry.content: Hello @KATRUGOPI , Please check if you have everything right in the postman to call CPI endpoint. also check if you the login id and password that you use assuming OAUTH credentials have proper authorizations.

entry.title: Re: Need help adding Live Connection from SAC to S/4Hana...
entry.content: Hello @beampakorn , Did you try to check if you have any authorization errors related to S_RFC*? we had same error and we were able to fix it and connect successfully after we adjusted the authorizations.

entry.title: Freight order missing after setting FO Status "Ready for Transport Execution"
entry.content:
Hello Support,

we noticed that in the order process flow, the freight order is no longer shown after setting the status "Ready for transport execution" Why?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Freight order missing after setting FO Status "Ready...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, once the status ‘Ready for Transportation Execution’ is set for a freight order, the consignment order document is created in the system. This document consolidates the transportation requirements, and the freight order itself might not be prominently displayed anymore in the process flow. Instead, the consignment order takes precedence as it is used to coordinate subsequent actions such as sending advanced shipping notifications and handling logistics execution. The focus shifts to managing and monitoring the consignment order, which reflects the freight units and their readiness for execution.

Additionally, after setting the ‘Ready for Transportation Execution’ status, activities such as goods picking, packing, and posting goods issues are tracked and recorded under the consignment order, which is why the freight order might not be extensively visible. This step indicates a transition from planning to execution, resulting in updates within the logistics workflow, and primarily tracking via consignment and delivery orders thereafter.

 

For further information please check SAP Help Portal: Consignment Orders

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Best patches for BI 4.3 SP04
entry.content: When I did a google search it recommended not to use SP4 or SP4 Patch 1100. It stated the SAP Community strongly advises against their versions due to known issues.

entry.title: Call Action Project error queryA ENOTFOUND in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Destination configuration 

we configured the S4HANA On-premise URL as a Destination like in a below screenshot.

Action Project

Process Automation Flow

We added the above Action project as a Dependency to our process automation flow like in a below screenshot.

Problem we are facing

Below is the response of the action activity 'GET_MAIL_LIST'.

I saw the similar issue in the below community link : Call web service error queryA ENOTFOUND - SAP Community However it didn't help us to resolve the issue.

Kindly help me to figure out the issue.

SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Build Process Automation 

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Sakthi.

entry.title: Re: Extending standard integration flow to support Customer extensions - Part I
entry.content: @AbinashNanda : I am extending the map for Replicating B2B Customers from SAP ERP to SAP Commerce Cloud . We have the Custom IDOC ZDEBMAS which has the Address segments added in it. In this scenario I don't have explicit ADRMAS , ADR3MAS IDOCs . Will the standard map work as expected by adding the preexit step for ZDEBMAS and post exit steps ?

entry.title: Re: in MD04, how to remove element if it's origin and des...
entry.content:
Hello Dominik,

You are right, SAP Note 2268085 does not clearly mention that BAdI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA will no longer be supported in MD04. 

However, if you set a break-point in function module AUFBAUEN_MDPSX_ANZEIGEN in an S/4HANA system, you will observe that the logic to read the planning elements from the database has been redesigned, and instead of sequentially reading the planning elements in an ABAP code, system now triggers an AMDP stored procedure to bulk read the planning elements in HANA. It basically means that the piece of code where MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA was called is no longer being executed. 

The easiest alternative is to call the ABAP MD_ADD_ELEMENTS, which is called just after the stored procedure is executed, and this will work if the issue only happens in MD04. 
The BEST alternative is to use the AMDP BAdI that I mentioned in this blog, which is called in MD04, the MRP Fiori Apps, MRP Live and Classic MRP. Note that this BAdI is only available for the latest S/4HANA releases. 

I'll contact the author of note 2268085 and ask him to update the information, adding MD04. 
Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: How to get the Cumulate Value in Data action - SAP An...
entry.content:
I couldn't proceed with the Calculated Measure and Copy Step.

How can I identify the Flag Account and post the YTD amount for the particular month?

VARIABLEMEMBER is not getting the previous months data

entry.title: Re: How to save/export business rules to PDF - truncates...
entry.content:
Hi @AlanWaters , hope you're doing great.

Have you considered to use the file you can download from "Import and export data" page as an option?

2651822 - How to Export Business Rules - https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2651822

It does not have the same visual appeal as the way the information is available on "Configure Business Rules" screen, but in case you're looking for a backup, this alternative can be helpful, since all the logic will also be available in the CSV file.

Hope this can help you while your Influence idea is not implemented.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

if it is possible to configure SAM to add service in an order, could you please indicate?

 

Best Regards,

Rafael Eij Umeda

entry.title: Re: Usage of Quantity Based- Inspection Point in Public C...
entry.content:
Hello @RajTilak54 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud 2502 we have the Configuration Activity 'Define Inspection Points '102243

 

The Configuration Activity came available with this release 

 

Please check the What's New Documentation at Record Results for Inspection Points: Configure Attributes

 

If this is not suitable for your requirement then please tell us what is missing inorder to use 'Quantity Based'

inspection points

 

Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Unable to find the Solution to Check Quality Parameter in Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Is MB5B used in S4 Hana?
entry.content: if you are using Fiori --Your Fiori Consultant has to enable WebGUI and app for MB5B in Fiori--Fiori App in Public Cloud and Private Cloud is Analyze Stock in Date Range --App ID-F6185

entry.title: Re: SNBCH - Zahlungsbilanz Schweiz - sehr lange Laufzeit

entry.title: Re: Exclude International Assignee from course assignments
entry.content:
Hi @JyotiA

Could you provide further clarification on the process? What parameter in the system classifies a user as an 'international assignee'? Additionally, what indicates to the system that these users have returned to their home location?

For example, through Assignment Profiles, we can set up a rule to include or exclude users based on their Job Location ID. This means that if the Job Location ID of these users is changed when they are not in their home location, and vice versa, courses could be assigned or unassigned through AP depending on this value. However, this is just an example. I need a better understanding of what specifically classifies these users as international assignees within the system.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text in manually added columns
entry.content:
@SANA11 

calculated measures could have dynamic descriptions based on input controls.

But if input controls are not an option. You could use scripting to read the description from the original measures and store it in 3 variables. Later you could use these variables to bind dynamic text and super impose it over your table columns to create a visual illusion.

 

Hope this helps !

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba User Provisioning Using SAP Identity Provisioning Service (IPS)
entry.content: hi Imran, thank you for publishing this blog, and I must say, I’m thoroughly impressed! The content is not only insightful but also incredibly practical for anyone in Ariba procurement, supply chain, or SAP business Network area to implement the CIS integration . The blog covers a detailed step by step approach in implementing the CIS for SAP Ariba products and  it well-written, and easy to understand.

In old ECC world the transaction was EMFOR and EMJIT. I don't find the respective app with similar functionalities as in oldor EMFOR / EMJIT in S/4HANA public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Task Center with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hi @Nandivardhan_Ganugapenta Facing similar kind of issue, have you found anything

entry.title: Live After Go Live: Building for Success with Tech Implementations
entry.content:
Without a clear roadmap and a comprehensive approach, many businesses find it challenging to integrate and fully leverage new technologies. In my daily conversations with customers globally, I encountered over 200 organizations last year that were struggling to achieve desired results from their tech implementations and couldn’t easily identify what wasn’t working. I increasingly notice that organizations acquire technology with the hope of creating a new reality within their businesses. They have “the dream” in mind but fail to translate that dream into concrete objectives and then communicate those objectives effectively to the implementation team and the subsequent "sustainment team." Why do organizations invest so much effort in the implementation phase, only to neglect the post-go-live or adoption phase? Once the initial phase is complete, the visibility, change management, and project team meetings often dwindle. I frequently advise that the post-go-live phase is just as important, if not more so, than the implementation phase. It's the moment of truth: if the technology is used as intended and the new way of working is adopted, then the expected results can materialize.

What Needs to Happen? Organizations need to form a collaborative team that includes representatives from IT, the business area where the tech was implemented (e.g., HR, Procurement, Finance, Production), and, in many cases, the implementation partner. This team should:

  1. Understand Post-Implementation Activities: Be clear about the activities required to keep the technology relevant, updated, and aligned with evolving business needs.
  2. Define Roles and Responsibilities: Have clear and formalized roles and responsibilities for each team member.
  3. Allocate Time Appropriately: Ensure that resources are allocated appropriately, with some team members dedicating 100% of their time and others contributing less.
  4. Set Clear Objectives & KPIs: Develop clear objectives and key performance indicators (KPIs) that address the question, "What do we aim to achieve in this business area with the technology enabling results and experiences?"
  5. Create an Adoption Plan: Develop an adoption plan that includes change management activities, adoption metrics, and a method to report progress.

Executive Sponsorship  plays a crucial role in this process. Without one or more leaders at the highest level of the organization communicating the importance of the new technology and the new way of working, it becomes much harder to achieve widespread adoption. Leaders must send clear messages that the technology is here to stay, there is no Plan B, and everyone will receive necessary information and trainings to cope with the change but no joiners can not be accepted .

SAP Customers: Join the Conversation If you are an SAP customer and want to delve deeper into these topics, come to our 1:Many or 1:Few sessions where customers and experts from SAP discuss these critical issues. By focusing on the post-go-live phase with the same intensity as the implementation phase, organizations can ensure that their investments in technology yield the desired transformational outcomes.

Link  to 1:Many calendar

Link to customer 1:Few roundtables calendar

 @nwright @fry @NPARDO;

entry.title: Re: How to report on items removed from the user's learni...
entry.content: Right. If the "User Learning Plan Audit Report (CSV)" is filtered by the user itself ("User - UserID") in the "Last Updated By" column (C), it'd be possible to identify the courses. After that, the filter can be changed to the courses, so you'll see the ones completed by user. Then, you'd know the ones that weren't and they could be reassigned.

Mahesh

entry.title: Re: Hello everyone! We are integrating scripts for SAP Di...

entry.title: Possibility of copying federation settings
entry.content:
Is it possible to copy federation settings from one environment to another, without affecting or copying any other data?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Possibility of copying federation settings
entry.content: Unfortunately, no. Only complete copy of whole environment is possible, outside the usage of Send/Deploy feature.

entry.title: Re: Issue with APK Installation - "App Not Installed as P...
entry.content: @princykumar From the SAP SUPPORT response from the SAP development team, I reported an issue with the keys generated by BTP and suggested uploading your own keystore, since ours was being used. This should resolve the signing profile issue.

entry.title: Re: Manually adding new meter reading results. Which tables need to be consider
entry.content: Answering my own question the system was in S/4 we simply resend out the meter reading request that was not in the DSO system from the MOS system. Then we use the emergency user to skip checks. Issue was that the MR was already in a billing order. Somehow the MR was gone from the system.

entry.title: CDS view joinning fields conversion

0000001343-000010

This field needs to be like that to be joinned with VBAK:
1343

Whats the recommended way to do it ? Create a helper CDS view converting it ?, create an AMDP for this?

If it is possible, please let a code implementation example.

Thank you!

According to SAP note 3075958, this has been fixed in ASE 16.1 SP00 PL01 (for CR 825178)

As it turns out, I'm no longer using Java in ASE, but maybe someone else will need this info.

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content: what is the solution?

entry.title: SAP Employee as a customer
entry.content: we want to extend SAP Employees as SAP SD customers so that they can place orders. Right now, employees are with Number Range 6 series and customers are with 1 series.

entry.title: Re: Resource 'pd:SAP_TPM_xxx:SOURCE_MSG_XSD:Binary' not f...
entry.content: Getting the latest update fixed the issue

entry.title: Need API policy for 404 condition
entry.content:
Hello Friends!!

I have a simple question that I haven't been able to answer myself 😞

I'm simply wanted to implement a policy that if the url is not a match I want to throw a 404.

However, the current state of my API policy allows any of the below to pass through to the end-point.

(correct) /cart/12068208/availability-check-url 

(invalid) /cart/12068208/availability

(invalid) /cart/12068208/availability-check-url-extra-characters

My condition is:

  <conditions>proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url(**"</conditions>

I can generate a Fault if the condition matches - I can't figure out how to generate a fault if it doesn't.

Below is the full export of my API.

Any guidance would be appreciated.

 

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ProxyEndPoint default="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <name>default</name>
    <base_path>/v2/private</base_path>
    <properties/>
    <routeRules>
        <routeRule>
            <name>default</name>
            <targetEndPointName>default</targetEndPointName>
            <sequence>1</sequence>
            <faultRules/>
        </routeRule>
    </routeRules>
    <faultRules/>
    <preFlow>
        <name>PreFlow</name>
        <request>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>GetServiceAuthenticationCredentials</policy_name>
                    <condition></condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>InjectHeaderAuthenticationCredentials</policy_name>
                    <condition></condition>
                    <sequence>2</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </request>
    </preFlow>
    <postFlow>
        <name>PostFlow</name>
    </postFlow>
    <conditionalFlows>
        <conditionalFlow>
            <name>DefaultFaultFlow</name>
            <request>
                <isRequest>true</isRequest>
                <steps>
                    <step>
                        <policy_name>defaultRaiseFaultPolicy</policy_name>
                        <condition></condition>
                        <sequence>1</sequence>
                    </step>
                </steps>
            </request>
            <conditions>proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url(**"</conditions>
            <readOnly>true</readOnly>
            <sequence>2</sequence>
        </conditionalFlow>
        <conditionalFlow>
            <name>cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url</name>
            <request>
                <isRequest>true</isRequest>
				<steps>
                    <step>
                        <policy_name>resourceNotFoundPolicy</policy_name>
                        <condition></condition>
                        <sequence>1</sequence>
                    </step>
                </steps>
            </request>
            <conditions>(proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/cart/{cart_id}/availability-check-url(**")AND(request.verb = "GET")</conditions>
            <readOnly>true</readOnly>
            <sequence>1</sequence>
        </conditionalFlow>
    </conditionalFlows>
</ProxyEndPoint>

entry.title: Re: LMS: Manager Sign-Off/Tasks
entry.content: Were you able to find a resolution to this as we have a similar need but I cant find a way to get the manager sign off.

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP ENABLE NOW Simulation Recording on SAP...
entry.content:
Hi Mickael,

If you are having issues recording Simulations in browser-based applications, such as Edge, there is a known current issue in Producer.  If your Rise application is running in Edge, look at this KBA for details about how you might address the issue until a fix is made available, likely in the May release this year.

After looking at the KBA, if you are still experiencing issues, please raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and have the support team take a closer look.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Best patches for BI 4.3 SP04
entry.content: What are your current sources for these recommendations? Yes, the are some problems with older versions, but I haven't seen any major issue with patch 1100 !?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Campinas 2025
entry.content: muito bom para se manter atualizado. Mas pela agenda na live do youtube vi que tem poucos temas para programador. Voce acha que é falta de propostas de palestrantes ou no balanço final é o tipo de tema menos popular para o evento como um todo?

entry.title: Re: Unlock new levels of productivity with AI in SAP Build
entry.content: Its great to see AI being infused in no-code and pro-code tools. Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text in manually added columns
entry.content: You beat me to it 🙂 input control or text boxes

entry.title: BPA SAP Desktop Agent v3.39.45. The job has been refused error.
entry.content:
Since the v3.39.45 update SAP Desktop Agent, I'm getting this error in Desktop agent.

The Job has been refused

This is happening for all my BPA projects, when launching a process or running the automation directly in design mode. Even a very simple one-step test project with a single dialog causes the error now.

So far tried the following:

  • Downgraded both the projects and Desktop Agent to the previous, working version. (3.38.59).
  • Removing and re-registering the agent in SAP Build
  • Uninstalling and re-installing Desktop Agent from scratch.

SAP Build Process Automation 

Any suggestions because at the moment we cannot run an BPA projects.

entry.title: Re: Can I display one field or another depending on filte...
entry.content:
As Nikhil has said, you can capture the filter value with a script. 

You can then use script to add/remove dimensions from a table. 

The code below uses the value selected in a dropdown, but you could just as easily use... If filter value =x etc 

E. G. Apologies for the small image, posting on my phone 

not sure if it's allowed, but...

https://cadenceanalytics.co.uk/store

entry.title: Re: SAC Input control Issue
entry.content:
A possibility is if the CDS view isn't correctly exposing the key-value pair (e.g., @ObjectModel.text.association or @ObjectModel.text.element), SAC may not recognize members properly.

This can cause SAC to fail when trying to filter by member because it expects a properly associated key and text field.

entry.title: Fondo de ahorro MX, devolución del descuento en retro por faltas/incapacidades
entry.content:
Tengo un detalle, ya que cuando un empleado tiene una falta/incapacidad retroactiva,  La deducción es positiva por lo que no podemos, digamos así, solicitarle al banco que regrese aportación del empleado, ya que no debíamos descontarle su aportación (es mas tampoco deberíamos mandar la aportación Cia)

Si un empleado esta incapacitado la seman apasada y la corriente, por el retro de la semana pasada el sistema le regresa lo que le desconto de fondo de ahorro, como en la semana corriente tambien tiene la incapacidad no hay forma de que se netear el importe, 

Entonces si la semana pasada le descontro $100 pesos, ahora se la regresa, yaque el fondo de ahorro estaa en función de su sueldo/salario.

Espero puedan ayudarme, que es lo que estan haciendo ustedes, implementaron alguna regla ?, podrian describir su solución ?

 

De antemano gracias y saludos,

    Rogelio

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite API Management mTLS on API Proxy
entry.content:
Hi Venkat,

Thankfully, this is mostly Self-Service now.  SAP Integration Suite - Configuring Additional Virtual Host 

I am in contact with SAP at the moment to discuss some of these topics; however, the full chain of the public certificate must be loaded into the Configure > APIs > Certificates Tab in .pem or .der format and must be in leaf + intermediate(s) + root certificate order.

Once loaded there and your Virtual Host configured for mTLS, anyone who has the keypair of your public certificate should be able to access a proxy deployed on this VirtualHost.

One big caveat that I still have questions on:
I have received confirmation from SAP "certificate authentication" only checks to make sure the Intermediate/Root certificate matches a reference in the Certificates loaded into your trust store.  Meaning you may have loaded a certificate for Customer A signed by a CA (i.e. Digicert).  This means if Customer B uses the same CA as Customer A, they will also have access to an API Proxy on your VirtualHost even though you didn't load Customer B's certificate.

I tested this with SAP Integration Suite Certificates from two different environments (both signed by Digicert) and was able to make API Proxy calls for a certificate I didn't load to the trust store.

Therefore, the way around this is to create a RaiseFault policy that checks the content of the certificate; however, the only way to do this is by creating an SAP Ticket to enable the Client and Connection Properties on your VirtualHost.

All-in-all a bit cumbersome process; but mostly self-service.

entry.title: Re: how to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA On...
entry.content:
The error message "We couldn't connect to your S/4HANA system..." when setting up a Live Connection from SAC to S/4HANA via Cloud Connector is typically caused by SSL certificate issues or network misconfigurations. Below are the troubleshooting steps to help resolve it.


---

1️⃣ Verify SSL Certificate Trust

Since SAC requires a trusted SSL certificate, if your S/4HANA system uses a self-signed or untrusted certificate, it may cause this issue.

🔹 Solution: Import the SSL Certificate

Open SAP Cloud Connector (SCC) UI (https://<SCC_HOST>:8443).

Go to Trust Manager and check if the SSL certificate of your S/4HANA system is trusted.

If not, manually import the SSL certificate from S/4HANA:

1. Open the S/4HANA URL in a browser (https://<S4_HOST>:<PORT>).


2. Export the SSL certificate (usually a .crt or .pem file).


3. In Cloud Connector UI, go to Administration > Certificate and Keys > Trusted Certificates.


4. Upload the exported SSL certificate and restart the SCC.

 

Also, ensure SAC trusts the SSL certificate:

1. Log into SAP Analytics Cloud.


2. Go to System > Administration > Security > Certificate Trust List.


3. Upload the same SSL certificate there.

 

 

---

2️⃣ Check Cloud Connector Status

Open SAP Cloud Connector (https://<SCC_HOST>:8443).

Go to Connector Status and ensure:

The connection to BTP is Green.

The connection to the backend system (S/4HANA) is Green.


If the status is Red, check:

The subaccount settings in SCC.

The mapping of internal/external hostnames.

The backend connection details.

 


---

3️⃣ Verify the Exposed Resources in Cloud Connector

In SAP Cloud Connector, go to:

Cloud to On-Premise > Access Control.

Ensure that S/4HANA is correctly exposed under Mapped System.

The Protocol should be HTTPS, and the Virtual Host/Port must match the live connection settings in SAC.


If using a Principal Propagation, ensure:

Identity Provider (IdP) is correctly configured.

The SAML assertion is properly mapped.

 


---

4️⃣ Validate the Connection in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)

Go to Connections in SAC and click Edit on the S/4HANA live connection.

Ensure that:

The Host/Port matches what is mapped in SCC.

The Authentication Type (e.g., "None", "Basic Authentication", or "Principal Propagation") is correct.

The Path Prefix is /sap/bw/ina/GetServerInfo (for INA-based connections).

 


---

5️⃣ Check Network & Proxy Settings

If your SAC instance is behind a firewall or proxy:

Whitelist the Cloud Connector’s IP in your firewall.

Check whether SAC can reach your S/4HANA system.

Run a traceroute from the Cloud Connector machine:

tracert <S4HANA_Host>

If network packets are blocked or failing, adjust firewall settings.

 


---

6️⃣ Enable Logging for More Debugging

On SAP Cloud Connector, go to:

Monitoring > Logs > Cloud Connector Logs.

Enable DEBUG mode and try reconnecting.

Look for connection errors in the logs.

7️⃣ Restart & Test Again

After making any changes:

1. Restart Cloud Connector (https://<SCC_HOST>:8443).

2. Restart the S/4HANA backend.

3. Retry creating the Live Connection in SAC.

entry.title: Re: StackOverflowError during 'Reset Everything' in Backoffice

Any Solutions to the above problems. Find below the error log

[] [DefaultCockpitConfigurationService] com.hybris.cockpitng.core.config.CockpitConfigurationUnavailable: Unable to get read access to configuration in 0 seconds

entry.title: Re: Update PMR item Status with in EWM during consumption...
entry.content: Thanks to Katrin and Ajit for the comments posted. We finally agreed to go with EEW extension to have our own field and use it during staging enhancement to filter the PMR lines having this field updated.

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023
entry.content:
Dear Gerhard,

thank you very much for detailed overview of the Work Permit Management. Could you please advise me what could be the reason that "Print work permit" function is not working for me (S4 Hana 2023)? I have maintained all the print settings as mentioned in the help (device type PDF1), but when I try to print permit nothing happened. Thank you in advance.

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Community CWB no Business Round Event – 44ª edição
entry.content:
No último Business Round Event, a SAP Community Curitiba marcou presença com a participação dos nossos curadores, Adriano e Luiz.

 

 

O evento, reconhecido por conectar profissionais e fomentar discussões estratégicas sobre tecnologia e negócios, foi uma excelente oportunidade para troca de experiências e networking.

Durante a 44ª edição, temas relevantes de inovação foram abordados, promovendo insights valiosos para a comunidade. A presença da SAP Community CWB reforça o compromisso em fortalecer a colaboração e compartilhar conhecimento entre os profissionais da região.

Se você participou do evento, compartilhe nos comentários os seus aprendizados e percepções.

Queremos continuar essa conversa e levar ainda mais conteúdo relevante para a nossa comunidade!

📍 Fique de olho nos próximos eventos e continue conectado com a SAP Community Curitiba!

#SAPCommunity #SAPCommunityCWB #BusinessRoundEvent #Networking #Inovação

entry.title: Re: api_warehouse_order_task_2
entry.content:
Hi @Jerry_Lowery

Thanks for the answer.

I followed your recommendation and found a way to get the E-Tag from the Get request and use it in the POST request with parameter in body:

{
    "DirectWhseTaskConfIsAllowed": true
}

, but I got the same error:

 

Can i make something else with this situation?

entry.title: Mass Maintenance - Products taking a long time
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are trying to use Mass Maintenance - Products to update some material details (valuation areas in this case) and if the import file contains any more than around 10-20 records the process becomes extremely slow to the point that it stops entirely, even after running for days. There are no errors in the process when we only import a few changes at a time but it is not practical to do this when we need to make around 1700 changes.

Does anyone know what could be causing this problem, or what steps we can take to diagnose what is causing the performance issue?

Thanks

entry.title: MM_EKKO : Unable to archive STO - Error The delivery costs are not cleared for STO
entry.content:
While trying to archive STO type ZUB, getting an error The delivery costs are not cleared for STO in preprocessing step. 

Found the note 334506 - Archiving MM_EKKO: Delivery costs no archiving  relevant for this issue. However, it is not compatible for current system release.

entry.title: Re: "Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP L...
entry.content: The new access credentials are working. Thank-you !

entry.title: Re: Unable to configure trusted RFC no matter what
entry.content: Dear Symon, please do the following 1. see and perform the solution in KBA 3321072 'Object Directory Entry LIMU COMM does not exist' when implementing TCI 2. see the content in Note 3287611: In case you are on SAP_BASIS relaese 7.31 or 7.40 and downloaded the note 3089413 before 25th February 2023 please apply note 3304520. Please know that Note 3089413 is a bit complicated. Read it carefully. Also share the Kernal version patch and SAP_BASIS version. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: How to define a selection limit to a Macro Table in SAPUI5 FPM Odata v4
entry.content:
Hi, experts!

I have a freestyle SAPUI5 FPM app consuming an odata v4 service provided by a CAP Project.
I need to set the selection limit for the macro table which the data is listed, because the default value is too low for the customer.

I did some debugging and found the property selectionLimit, but change it did not take any effect to this message above.

At the init method of my controller, I set the selectionLimit like this:
oMacroTable.getTableDefinition().control.selectionLimit = 5000

But when I try to select all records again, the alert message shows as well.

That is the xml code I'm using for the macro table:

Do you know how to properly set the selection limit for a macro table?

Best Regards

entry.title: Step-by-Step Guide: Installing SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 (aka SAP BI 2025)
entry.content:
Get ready for SAP BI 2025!

Welcome to this comprehensive tutorial on installing SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025, the latest evolution of SAP's trusted business intelligence platform.

As someone who has been working with this technology for over 25 years and writing installation guides since SAP BI 4.1 back in 2013, I know how important a smooth setup process is. This guide will walk you through every step, complete with screenshots and useful links, so you can get SAP BI 2025 up and running without any headaches.

I still can't believe SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 is here!  Bringing a fresh wave of enhancements that make business intelligence more efficient, secure, and future-ready.  Let’s do this!

Before you start

Here are some useful links I think are worth reading first before going ahead and getting technical!

🚀What's New:

  • Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 by @GregBotticchio
  • Experience Your Favourite BI Platform, BOBJ, in a Fresh New Look with the SAP BI 2025 Release by @VenkateswaraGupthaY
  • SAP BI 2025: What’s New In Web Intelligence and Semantic Layer by @christian_ah-soon 
  • SAP BI 2025: What’s New in Crystal Reports by @donald_guo 
  • Official What's New (SAP Help)

📝Strategy:

  • SAP Analytics Business Intelligence Statement of Direction
  • SAP BI On Premise Maintenance Strategy
  • BI 2025 Maintenance Strategy & Schedule (SAP Note)

General Availability: 12.03.2025 (Version: 14.4.0.5253)
End of Mainstream Maintenance: 31.12.2027

 ⚙️ Technical:

  • 🔥 Supported Platforms (PAM) 
  • ⚠️ Products and features are removed in SAP BusinessObjects BI platform 2025 (SAP Notes)
  • 🆘 SAP Business Intelligence Suite Release Restrictions
  • 💾 SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Release Notes
  • User Guides (SAP Help)
  • Installation & Upgrade Guides (SAP Help)
  • Administrator's Guides (SAP Help)

Technical Assessment

Run a Free SAP BI 2025 Readiness Assessment

Wiiisdom offers a free Customer Cockpit in 360Suite that helps assess your organization's readiness for SAP BI 2025. This tool provides valuable statistical insights about your environment, including:

  • The number of UNV universes that will need to be converted to UNX.
  • The number of Crystal Reports for Enterprise that must be converted to Crystal Reports "Classic" or Web Intelligence.
  • The number of Lumira visualizations that will need to be rebuilt in SAP Analytics Cloud or Web Intelligence.
  • The number of Live Office documents that must be rebuilt in SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office or Web Intelligence.
  • The number of documents in Analysis for OLAP that will need to be rebuilt in SAP Analytics Cloud or Web Intelligence.

In addition, the solution provides insights into your Universes' usage, such as:

  • The number of documents still pointing to UNV universes (these will need to be repointed).
  • The number of UNX Multi Source Universes (MSU) that will need to be converted to Single Source Universes (SSU).

Pre-Requisites

License Keys

Before proceeding with a new installation, upgrade, or migration of SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025, it is essential to generate a new License Key. Even if you are upgrading from a previous version, a fresh license key is required to activate BI 2025 successfully.

In addition to reviewing the provided documents and links, make sure to complete this step before installation to avoid any activation issues.

This actually might be the most complicated part of this entire project!

For guidance on generating your SAP BI 2025 license key, refer to the following links:

  • 📌 How to generate license keys for SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform (SAP Notes)
  • 📌 SAP provides Emergency License Keys valid for 90-days in case there are issues in obtaining your permanent keys.  Make sure to read the important notes at the top of the PDF.

Software Download

Finding all the necessary installation files for SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 can sometimes be a bit tricky. If you're having trouble locating them, don't worry—SAP provides a helpful SAP Note that outlines exactly where to download everything you need.

📌 How to download SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence (BI) software (SAP Notes)

📌 Shortcut to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Download page

Installation Steps

The steps outlined below are specific to the Windows installation, but the process for Linux is very similar; please refer to the official documentation for more detailed instructions.

The first step is to launch the installer. You can execute the initial file you downloaded, "BIPLATS4400_0-80008823_P1.EXE," or, personally, I prefer using a tool like WinRAR to extract the file to a folder first and then run "setup.exe" to start the installation. In both cases, the second file, "BIPLATS4400_0-80008823_P2.RAR," will be used automatically. Choose whichever method you prefer!

 

 

 

As you can see here, the prerequisite check failed because I needed to address a suppressed reboot. Whatever the issues may be, they will need to be resolved before you can continue.

 

 

 

Although you can change your mind later and select additional languages, I strongly recommend making your decision during the initial installation to avoid lengthy steps and unnecessary risks.

Based on my experience, unless I only require a Web Server, selecting the Web Tier is perfect for the job. In all other cases, I opt for a Full installation and, if necessary, manually disable the Tomcat service. While this may waste some disk space and take a little more time during updates, it ensures that you have a Web Tier available on that application server for troubleshooting purposes.

I would never choose a Custom / Expand installation. In the end, you'll only save a bit of disk space, but you'll reduce your flexibility later on.

Remember: SAP doesn't recommend using the default SQL Anywhere Database for BI in Production.  SAP Note.  Here I'll be using Microsoft SQL Server Express 2022 but below is the screen you'd get if you decided to stick with Sybase SQL Anywhere.

It requires some technical skills but it is possible to change your mind later on and use a different database for the System Database without losing your data.  You'd be doing this in the Central Configuration Manager (CCM).  It's a different story for the Audit Database...

 

 

 

 

Note: In this case, I created my ODBC connections first.  If you forget, you can go ahead at this stage and click Refresh to load them in the installer.

 

 

Note: The SIA Port and the same below for the CMS and Tomcat can be changed easily after the installation.

 

Note: Make sure you keep all these passwords in a vault or something.  The CMS Cluster Key is needed for a number of things like clustering servers for instance.

 

 

 

 

 

 🥳 And... Done

About screen from the Central Management Console (CMC):

 About screen from the BI launch pad:

Post-Installation Configuration

When logging into the Central Management Console (CMC) for the first time, you will be prompted with the System Configuration Wizard. While this can be done at a later stage and is available from the main menu, I recommend completing it sooner rather than later.

In short, this wizard will guide you through the process of splitting and configuring your Adaptive Processing Servers (APS). The more RAM you have, the more options you'll be able to configure.

This isn't a new wizard, but I’m always surprised to see production environments where the APS aren’t optimally configured. This is a great place to start, and be sure to consult the administrator's and sizing guides for more detailed information.

 

 

 

Note: As you can see, selecting 15-25 GB RAM will create 7 APS on this node.  The default installation only has 1 APS.

 

 

 

 

 

Conclusion

I'm sure you're as excited as I am about this new release, and I hope this guide has been helpful to you.

There’s a lot of great documentation out there, but it can be all over the place and difficult to find. My goal with these guides remains the same: to provide what I think are the most useful and important resources all in one place.

Feel free to share your comments and suggestions!

Thanks, and take care.

entry.title: Page Footer Supress Does Not Work Properly
entry.content:
This is a problem I've had since 2011 at the beginning of Crystal Reports, and it still occurs today in the 2020 SP4/P4 version (14 year of problem).

When a page footer is defined and suppressed without formula, the detail takes advantage of the entire sheet with the records.

When it is suppressed via formula, it does not take over the space.

SAP Crystal Reports 

See code Archive RPT example 

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 10 FP2502 / SQL SERVER 2019 / SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Installing SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 (aka SAP BI 2025)
entry.content:
Happy to see the installation sequence flown smoothly.

#BI2025 #SAP #BOBJ

entry.title: I registered for the CER006 but had medical issues didn’t use any. Anyone had extension
entry.content: I bought the CER006 but was very sick last year . Just getting on my feet now . Anyone ever had an extension ? Or will they give me any credit . Because I didn’t use any attempt??? @SAPLearningHub
